text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Mainichi Okan now behind us, we steer
ahead for the autumn Tenno Sho. The days
leading to it are full of nothing but training.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her times are improving daily!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Amazing! You're getting so fast!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Which is great, but...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But what?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uh, nothing! Just... don't overwork yourself,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Thanks for your concern, but I'm having so
much fun right now. You don't have to worry
about me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We continue training until the day right before
the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! Nothing beats a nice hot bath!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Suzuka, what's with the compress on your
leg?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it hurts a little so I thought it'd be best to put
it on, just in case.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What?! But tomorrow's—

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It's okay. I can still run.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wait, just think about it!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
So you want me to withdraw from the autumn
Tenno Sho tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzuka, I know you're unbelievably strong...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You can run on and on without slowing down for
even a second, and my heart feels so full every
time I see you do just that...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But that's exactly why I'm so worried about you! If
something were to happen, then...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Please! I don't know what I'd do if you couldn't
run!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A heavy silence falls over the room.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Listen, Spe...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I never could have made it where I am now on my
own.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The only reason I've managed to get so far is
because... you and Trainer believed in me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: As I am right now—as we are right now—I just know the scenery will be truly incredible tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
We're Umamusume... We're all going to reach our
peak at some point or other.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What if right now, I'm the fastest I'll ever be?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Tomorrow's race could be the only chance I'll
have to compete at my very best.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: So please understand, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume can't maintain their peak condition
forever. Once they've passed their prime as an
athlete, their abilities will only decline.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You're not being fair!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't that just mean that, no matter what I say,
I can't stop you?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, Spe...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But I'll be okay. You have to believe me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Promise me you'll come back safe." The words
with which Special Week sends Silence Suzuka off
are short but heartfelt.
